query: South Korea arms export deals 2026, especially Poland K2 tank second executive contract, any deals expected July-August 2026 worth over $5 billion
answer:
Research complete. Here is the summary of my findings:

## Key Finding: Timing Correction

**The Poland K2 tank "second executive contract" was already signed on August 1, 2025** — worth ~$6.5 billion ($6.7B including all "Armor Week" vehicle contracts) — **not** July–August 2026 as the research question presumed. It is a completed event, not a pending mid-2026 deal.

## What This Means for a July–August 2026 $5B+ Deal

**No specific South Korea arms deal over $5 billion is publicly confirmed to sign in July–August 2026.** However, the forward-looking pipeline includes:

1. **Poland K2 THIRD executive contract (the real candidate)** — Per a July 8, 2026 Defence24 factory report, this is proposed but unsigned: ~210 K2PL tanks (120 Korean-built + 90 Polish-built) + 35 engineering vehicles. "If signed this year [2026], implemented 2026–2034." This would likely exceed $5B, but has **no confirmed signing date**. Poland's overall framework covers up to ~1,000 tanks across six contracts.

2. **UAE** — Seoul is pursuing up to $15B in Middle East contracts (Hanwha K9 local production, additional Cheongung-II/KM-SAM II), but nothing signed as of mid-2026.

3. **KF-21 Boramae fighters** — Advancing talks with Indonesia (binding contract targeted 1H 2026), Philippines, UAE, Malaysia; individual deals below $5B.

## Contract Chronology
- **1st contract**: Aug 2022, $3.7B, 180 K2GF (delivered by late 2025)
- **2nd contract**: Aug 1, 2025, $6.5B, 180 tanks (116 K2GF + 64 K2PL) + 81 support vehicles
- **April 2026**: Bumar-Łabędy/Hyundai Rotem localization subcontract signed
- **3rd contract**: Proposed only, no firm date

**Bottom line for forecasting**: A large K2 third contract is plausible in 2026 but not confirmed for July–August specifically. The full structured data, sources, and data points have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Poland doubles down on South Korean tanks with $6.5 billion deal
sources.snippet: Polish MoD ordered 180 K2 Black Panther tanks with 81 vehicles from Hyundai Rotem, worth ~$6.5 billion, signed August 1, 2025 in Gliwice.

sources.title: Hyundai Rotem signs $6.5 billion agreement with Poland for second batch of K2 main battle tanks
sources.snippet: Signing August 1 at Bumar-Łabędy; 116 K2GF delivered 2026-2027, 64 K2PL 2028-2030, 61 K2PL final assembly in Poland.

sources.title: With $6.7 billion in new tanks and vehicles, it's 'Armor Week' in Poland
sources.snippet: Poland signed almost $6.7 billion in ground vehicle contracts, most in the $6.5 billion Hyundai Rotem K2 second deal.

sources.title: South Korean tanks for Poland (Defence24 factory report)
sources.snippet: 1,000 tanks ordered across 6 production contracts; third contract proposal ~210 K2PL (120 Korean-built, 90 Polish-built) + 35 engineering vehicles, implemented 2026-2034 if signed this year.

sources.title: Poland Bought Up to 1,000 K2 Tanks From South Korea. The Real Prize Was the Factory
sources.snippet: Framework allows up to 1,000 K2 tanks; 820 for Polish domestic production; April 2026 subcontracting agreement moved plan to factory floor.

sources.title: Korea Defense Industry 2026: The $37B K-Arms Export Boom
sources.snippet: Big Four 2026 revenue ~50.58 trillion won (~$37.4B); backlog >$72B; Saudi Cheongung-II $3.2B; Poland Chunmoo $4B Dec 2025.

sources.title: Major Arms Deal South Korea Aims for with UAE Worth $15 Billion
sources.snippet: South Korea working to secure potential arms contracts worth up to $15 billion with UAE and Middle East buyers.

sources.title: Hanwha Aerospace to Produce, Sell K9 Howitzers in UAE
sources.snippet: Hanwha pursuing local production and sales of K9 in UAE; Cheongung-II strong candidate for additional UAE export.

sources.title: South Korea to sign first KF-21 fighter export deal with Indonesia for 16 jets
sources.snippet: First KF-21 export agreement with Indonesia for 16 jets; binding contract planned first half of 2026.

sources.title: Poland orders more K2 MBTs, support vehicles
sources.snippet: Polish Armaments Agency signed second executive contract with Hyundai Rotem for 180 more K2 MBTs on August 1 at Bumar-Łabędy.

sources.title: Poland signs agreement to produce South Korean K2 tanks domestically
sources.snippet: Bumar-Łabędy signed agreement with Hyundai Rotem for domestic K2 production (April 2026).
